svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
svg.aria-label: carbon credit MRV: a tonne with content-addressed measurement, reporting, and verification
svg.title: emem for voluntary carbon market MRV
svg.desc: A 100,000-tonne biocarbon project: each tonne is anchored to specific (cell, band, tslot) facts — biomass, NDVI, fire perimeters, leakage perimeters — every value content-addressed and signed. ICVCM-grade integrity, audit-ready by default.
svg.text: FOR · CARBON DEVELOPERS · ICVCM · CCP-LABEL BUYERS · ART/VERRA
a carbon credit where the carbon is content-addressed.

g.text: issued under VM0048 / IFM · CCP-eligible · ICVCM-aligned
verifies offline · re-issuable via deterministic recompute
— retire credit via attest call · same merkle log

svg.text: Each tonne carries the pixels that justify it.

g.text: Aligned with ICVCM Core Carbon Principles, Verra VCS 4.7, ART TREES, Gold Standard digital MRV — and the EU Empowering Consumers Directive 2026.
retroactive audit on a 10-year vintage is just a recall
